map.title: NH 75, near Nandini Palace, Kolar.

directions.label: By road
directions.value: On NH-75 (Old Madras Road), near Nandini Palace, Kumbarahalli, Kolar. A gem for travellers heading towards Tirupati.

directions.label: Parking
directions.value: Plenty of parking — free parking lot, free street parking, paid parking lot, and paid street parking all available.
